models.notes: Pricing page marks 'unavailable' with a 'Learn more' link; reason not yet captured.
Available at standard Opus pricing per Anthropic docs.
Available at standard Opus pricing per Anthropic docs. Fast mode unavailable as of 2026-06-29 (runs at standard speed/rates).
Available at standard Opus pricing per Anthropic docs.
Anthropic positions as 'ideal for complex agentic coding and enterprise work.' Verify context_window on docs.anthropic.com; pricing page does not display it.
Available at standard Sonnet pricing per Anthropic docs.
Anthropic positions as 'optimal balance of intelligence, cost, and speed.' Verify context_window on docs.anthropic.com.
Anthropic positions as 'fastest, most cost-efficient model.' Verify context_window on docs.anthropic.com.
Older model. Not on current OpenAI flagship pricing page. Venice resells via openai-gpt-4o-2024-11-20. Verify direct pricing (likely still available via OpenAI API).
Older mini model. Not on current pricing page. Venice resells. Verify direct pricing.
Older GPT-5 minor version. Not on current pricing page. Venice resells. Verify direct pricing.
Code-focused variant. Not on current pricing page. Venice resells. Verify direct pricing.
Code-focused variant in beta. Not on current pricing page. Venice resells. Verify direct pricing.
OpenAI positions as 'a more affordable model for coding and professional work.' No separate cache-write charge. Standard processing mode pricing.
OpenAI positions as 'our strongest mini model yet for coding, computer use, and subagents.' Standard processing mode pricing.
Pro tier variant. Not on current flagship pricing page. Venice resells at $37.50/$225 with overage tier. Verify direct pricing.

OpenAI positions as 'a new class of intelligence for coding and professional work.' No separate cache-write price; regular input rate applies on first read, with discounted reads thereafter. Standard processing mode; batch is 50% off and data residency adds 10%.
Pro tier of flagship. Not on the current main pricing page. Venice resells at $37.50/$225. Verify direct pricing.
Standard tier pricing. Batch and Flex modes are 50% off ($0.25/$1.50). Priority mode is $0.90/$5.40. Free tier available.
Tiered pricing: rates double above 200K input tokens. Batch and Flex are 50% off. Priority is 80% premium.
Standard tier. Batch and Flex are 50% off. Priority is $2.70/$16.20. Context cache storage billed per Mtok per hour.
xAI's docs do not specify cache pricing or tiered context pricing. 1M token context.
xAI ships reasoning and non-reasoning variants under the same price; both covered by this entry. Cache pricing not specified.
Multi-agent variant of Grok 4.20. Same per-token pricing.
Build-focused variant. 256K context.
Venice resells Anthropic's Fable 5. Markup applies.
Venice resells older Opus 4.5.
Beta on Venice.
Venice 'Fast' variant: same model, accelerated inference at a premium.
Venice resells. ~20% markup over Anthropic direct.
Venice 'Fast' variant of Opus 4.8.
Beta on Venice. ~20% markup over Anthropic direct.
Beta on Venice. ~25% markup over OpenAI direct.
Tiered: rates double above 272K input tokens.
Beta on Venice. ~25% markup over OpenAI direct. Tiered: rates double above 272K input tokens.
OpenAI's open-source 120B release, hosted by Venice. No single upstream provider — open weights.
Tiered: rates above 200K input tokens.
Tiered: rates double above 200K input tokens. ~13% markup over xAI direct (lower than Claude/GPT markup).
No markup over xAI direct on base rate.
Open weights model, hosted by Venice.
